top_signals.title: Sunshine Silver Raises $270 Million in US IPO
top_signals.summary: Sunshine Silver Mining & Refining Co. raised $270 million in a US initial public offering that priced at the low end of the marketed range, with the funds expected to be used for restarting production at an Idaho mine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The Bank, FCA and HM Treasury joint statement on Frontier AI models and cyber resilience
top_signals.summary: Statement from the Bank of England, Financial Conduct Authority and HM Treasury
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: FCA and Bank of England set out shared vision for tokenisation in UK wholesale markets
top_signals.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority and the Bank of England set out a shared vision and seek industry views on the future of UK wholesale markets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Market Participants Group meeting – 7 May 2026
top_signals.summary: The Market Participants Group (MPG) is a senior-level forum for financial market participants to share their views on relevant themes and narratives in financial markets with members of the Bank of England’s Monetary Policy Committee.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Five Eyes intelligence alliance warns of Chinese spying via job sites
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: PRA announces ring-fence change to reduce costs
top_signals.summary: The Prudential Regulation Authority has today announced plans to consult on reforming rules around shared operational services for ring-fenced banks.

top_signals.title: Blackstone Private Credit Fund Caps Redemptions
top_signals.summary: Blackstone limited redemptions from its flagship private credit fund for the first time, after investors sought to pull 10% of the shares. Silas Brown has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Robinhood Shifts Some World Cup Bets Away From Kalshio
top_signals.summary: Robinhood Markets Inc. is kickstarting a shift away from its longstanding prediction markets partner Kalshi Inc., using the World Cup to road test its own infrastructure.
